display.purpose: The Home statement and major Product or Collection titles.

body.purpose: Plain Mongolian product, delivery, policy, and checkout copy.

label.purpose: Controls, prices, status, and literal shelf coordinates.

shadows.name: shelf-rail
shadows.purpose: Horizontal pantry beams and plinths only.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Cart feedback, sheets, and image/price continuity.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Pointer press feedback on direct actions.

motion.name: local-continuity
motion.purpose: Variant image/price crossfade and occasional local transitions.

components.name: Tomato Purchase Button
components.description: The one dominant purchase action in a region.
components.css: .ds-u48-buy { min-height: 48px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 18px; background: oklch(55% 0.19 33); color: oklch(99% 0.004 80); font: 700 13px/1.3 Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 160ms ease; } .ds-u48-buy:hover { background: oklch(45% 0.17 31); } .ds-u48-buy:active { transform: scale(.97); } .ds-u48-buy:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Butter Merchandising Button
components.description: A single secondary emphasis against Tomato or Navy.
components.css: .ds-u48-butter { min-height: 48px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 18px; background: oklch(88% 0.14 88); color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); font: 700 13px/1.3 Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-u48-butter:hover { filter: brightness(.96); } .ds-u48-butter:active { transform: scale(.97); } .ds-u48-butter:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Store Search
components.description: The conventional header search that remains larger than decorative navigation.
components.css: .ds-u48-search { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); font: 700 13px/1.3 Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-u48-search input { min-height: 50px; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.035 76); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 80); color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); font: 400 16px/1.5 Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-u48-search input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Availability
components.description: Explicit fresh availability with a redundant Leaf marker.
components.css: .ds-u48-stock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.035 76); border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 10px; background: oklch(99% 0.004 80); color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); font: 700 13px/1.3 Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-u48-stock > span { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(57% 0.13 135); }

components.name: Pantry Shelf Bay
components.description: One physical merchandising compartment, square and rail-bound.
components.css: .ds-u48-bay { display: flex; min-height: 180px; flex-direction: column; justify-content: end; border: 10px solid oklch(70% 0.075 72); border-radius: 0; padding: 18px; background: oklch(88% 0.14 88); color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(57% 0.075 65); font-family: Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-u48-bay span { color: oklch(45% 0.17 31); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-u48-bay strong { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 18px; } .ds-u48-bay small { margin-top: 6px; font-size: 13px; }

components.name: Restock Product Row
components.description: Direction C density for Search and repeat purchase, not the Home hero.
components.html:
Өглөөний цагаан будаа, 1 кгБэлэн
5,400 ₮
components.css: .ds-u48-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 58px minmax(0,1fr) auto 44px; gap: 14px; align-items: center; min-height: 78px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(84% 0.035 76); padding: 10px 0; color: oklch(24% 0.025 48); font-family: Arial, 'Noto Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-u48-thumb { width: 58px; height: 58px; border: 8px solid oklch(70% 0.075 72); background: oklch(99% 0.004 80); } .ds-u48-row div { display: grid; gap: 6px; } .ds-u48-row strong { font-size: 15px; } .ds-u48-row small { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 12px; } .ds-u48-row small i { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(57% 0.13 135); } .ds-u48-row > b { font-size: 15px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-u48-row button { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(55% 0.19 33); color: oklch(99% 0.004 80); font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-u48-row button:hover { background: oklch(45% 0.17 31); } .ds-u48-row button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: Өрнүүн 48 is a bright, fictional Ulaanbaatar household Store organized with the physical clarity of a well-kept apartment pantry. This direction advances the founder-accepted Pantry shelf prototype: the page ground moves closer to neutral, birch and photography carry warmth, compartments breathe, literal timber framing is concentrated in merchandising, typography is less cramped, and the conventional Search/Cart header remains visible.
keyCharacteristics: Pale birch structure concentrated in the Home hero and merchandising shelves.
Near-neutral page ground with warmth supplied by wood and sunlit product photography.
Tomato actions, butter signals, leaf availability, and navy trust information.
Square shelf geometry paired with compact rounded controls.
Large, tightly composed Mongolian display type without cramped letterforms.
Restock-list density for Search; generous product imagery for discovery.

rules.name: The Shelf Concentration Rule
rules.body: Use the physical shelf metaphor strongly once, then echo it through rails, numbering, and alignment. Do not box every section in timber.

rules.name: The Warmth Has a Source Rule
rules.body: Warmth comes from birch, sunlight, tomato, and butter—not a beige wash over every surface.

rules.name: The Signal Discipline Rule
rules.body: Tomato means action, Butter means emphasis, Leaf means availability, and Navy means trust or consequential information. Do not swap these roles for novelty.

rules.name: The One Shelf Label Rule
rules.body: Numbering and compact uppercase marks belong to physical shelf coordinates. Do not place a tracked uppercase eyebrow above every heading.

rules.name: The Price Rhythm Rule
rules.body: MNT amounts use tabular figures, remain on one line, and carry stronger weight than adjacent status metadata.

rules.name: The Physical-Only-Where-Physical Rule
rules.body: A shelf rail may cast a shelf shadow. A Product row, form field, policy block, or status message may not imitate furniture.

dos: Do use Direction A's pantry shelf as the identity source and Direction C's row rhythm for Search and repeat purchase.
Do concentrate birch framing in the Home hero and selected merchandising shelves.
Do keep the page ground near-neutral and let bright kitchen photography carry warmth.
Do keep Search and Cart conventional, visible, and easy to reach on every viewport.
Do use semantic Mongolian HTML for every Product name, SKU, price, status, and control; imagery never carries commerce truth.
Do pair availability color with explicit text and recheck live truth before enabling purchase.
Do crop generated product imagery consistently, favoring bright daylight, clear silhouettes, and blank fictional packaging.
Do reduce mobile composition to readable bays and compact rows rather than shrinking the desktop cabinet.
Do use 120–220ms ease-out feedback, Astro route continuity, and immediate reduced-motion alternatives.
donts: Don't turn the accepted pantry direction into a generic Shopify-style theme where only red, cream, and a logo distinguish the Store.
Don't create Shadcn-style card grids dressed up as commerce; the shelf is a composition, not a collection of rounded cards.
Don't let the shelf metaphor hide products, prices, search, or purchasing behind novelty.
Don't tint the entire application cream or beige; use Clear Ground outside physical birch regions.
Don't repeat timber borders, inset shadows, shelf numbers, or uppercase labels on every section.
Don't use the prototype's -0.055em to -0.08em heading spacing; never tighten display text beyond -0.04em.
Don't make Tomato, Butter, Leaf, and Navy interchangeable decorative accents.
Don't put readable brand copy, prices, SKUs, barcodes, QR codes, or authoritative status inside generated images.
Don't animate keyboard actions, quantity truth, payment truth, or unavailable states.
Don't copy Direction B's room photography into every route or Direction C's operational density into discovery-led Home merchandising.
